english: Golden Rooster Stands on One Leg
visual: Tall one-legged stance with the raised knee lifted to waist height and the same-side hand raised high with fingers pointing up.
motion_description: Weight shifts fully onto the left leg as the right knee lifts to waist height and the right arm sweeps upward in front of the chest, fingers pointing up and palm facing inward. The left hand simultaneously presses downward near the left hip, before the right foot steps back down to return to a wide stance. The motion then mirrors on the opposite side, shifting weight to the right leg as the left knee and arm rise in unison, with the slow, deliberate flow punctuated by a distinct pause at the peak of each one-legged posture.
